text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's finished. The race we've been<n>working
towards with King Halo since<n>summer is now
over.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
King Halo clawed her way up from<n>rock bottom,
and Agnes Digital bore<n>witness to the entire
journey.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Do you understand now that we've<n>run a great
match together, Digital?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Do you understand what kind of<n>runner I am?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Yes... I do...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What's wrong? I can't hear you<n>properly through
all those tears.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Your essence... rained down upon me,<n>and I was
completely enveloped.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You've taught me what it means to<n>live as an
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's to have a soul possessed by the<n>persistent
will to run! Instinct! To<n>have, whether perfect or
not, the<n>strength of will to be first-rate!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I knew nothing before—not as a fan or<n>as an
athlete!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But now I understand clearly.<n>Self-deprecation or
self-pity? Don't<n>make me laugh. Just run! If you
want<n>to cry, do it while you run!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Before, I only saw Umamusume for<n>what they
were on the surface. But<n>now that I have peered
into their<n>depths...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I love them more than ever!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You're a real Umamusume fan,<n>huh?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Well, just as I must be true to myself,you must be yourself. If you trulycherish all Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Race against as many as you can and<n>absorb
everything. And then...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Become a true all-rounder. You<n>yourself are one of
the Umamusume<n>that you love so much.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, my kindred spirit. I return to<n>you bearing
words of wisdom from<n>King.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She says I must run against as many
Umamusume as possible. Is there a<n>way to
configure this into our next<n>objective?
choice_data_list: Guess we're gonna have to go on a racing binge.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A racing binge! Hmhmmm! You mean<n>we should
register for all the G1<n>races we can, right? Turf
and dirt!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I'm in! And then, next<n>year, I'll be
able to face the most<n>intense Uma combo ever—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Opera O and Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hey, Opera O. Did you hear about<n>Digital?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. According to the fine editors<n>of Lord's
Tribune Online, she put on a<n>good show at the Mile
Championship.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
She'll be a senior as well next year.<n>We should
welcome her<n>wholeheartedly in each race she
endeavors to run.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Definitely. But... it seems like she'sgotten really strong. ...Do you thinkwe'll be okay? Will I be okay?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! That remains to be<n>seen, but Digital
also has a flaw.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
There's something crucial she lacks,<n>as a
consequence of her unique<n>aptitude.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
She is a rare and elusive all-rounder,<n>yes,
possessed with the strange<n>ability to run
unhindered on both turf<n>and dirt.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But that ability is what robs her of the<n>opportunity
to attain one<n>ever-important thing.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Something crucial she can't attain...<n>What is it?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: A peer with whom to run. Put simply,a rival!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Like what you are to me, Doto, and I<n>to you.
Without a sworn enemy,<n>there's no one to push
her skills ever<n>upward.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In other words, Digital is like a nomad<n>with no
defined path. And because<n>she walks a path all
her own, no one<n>can walk it beside her.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Given that, can she truly triumph over<n>the likes of
us? I, for one, am tickled<n>with anticipation to
discover that<n>answer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Next year... Can Agnes Digital put on<n>a good show
at her G1 races and<n>stand before her two idols?
